title: Auto Totem Swapper
description: This mod is created by @TheEpitex youtube channel. Swap player's broken totem automatically.
body:
Developed by @TheEpitex YouTube channel, this mod detects when the player’s Totem of Undying breaks and instantly replaces it with another from the inventory, keeping the player safe in critical moments.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4yNo12TTaOY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
